rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(237, 237, 237));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 212px; height: 1px; padding-top: 15px; margin-left: 10px;

- conduct follow-up interviews to validate information and fill any information gaps

div.div: - identify and document resource requirements based on BIAs
- conduct gap analysis to determine gaps between recovery requirements and current capabilities
- select recovery strategies with management approval
